title: Dutch Chicken Casserole
description: A hearty Dutch-inspired casserole made with chicken, robust flavors, and a rich sauce.

ingredients.name: Dutch cheese (such as Gouda or Edam)

instructions: Season the chicken breast with salt, pepper, and Casserole robust seasoning.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken breast until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
In the same skillet, add more oil if necessary. Sauté the onion and garlic until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the skillet and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Slowly add the chicken broth to the skillet, whisking constantly to avoid lumps. Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened, about 2-3 minutes.
Stir in the shredded Dutch cheese until melted and smooth.
In a large baking dish, arrange the cooked chicken breast in the bottom. Pour the cheese sauce over the chicken.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and the cheese is bubbly.
